Working in the Gambling Industry as an Engineer: A Reality Check

The gambling industry feels mysterious to outsiders — high salaries and an opaque vibe make people curious, but the same factors make it scary. I worked in this space briefly (in Taiwan), and several friends still do. This post shares what I learned about the tech stacks, the lifestyle, the comp, and the real risks — including legal exposure that's specific to Taiwan but worth thinking about no matter where you work.
